identity.description: A high-end, clean, and modern dealership website for Punjab Honda. It uses a stark, high-contrast palette anchored by the iconic Honda Red. The aesthetic is technical, trustworthy, and premium—eschewing standard 2010 dealership templates for a 'Performance Pro' meets 'Swiss Brutalism' feel. The focus is purely on the bikes (product is hero) and seamless user forms for inquiries/booking.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' (Tech/Art) - Bold technical sans for headings, highly legible clean sans for body and forms.

fonts.mono: JetBrains Mono, monospace (for EMI calculator digits & specs)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

typography.installation: Ensure Outfit and Manrope are imported via Google Fonts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind p-8 to p-24) to let the vehicles breathe. Dense, highly structured grids for the Admin Dashboard.

grids.marketing_hero: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with overlapping image and text elements
grids.admin_dashboard: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 (Sidebar col-span-2, Main col-span-10)

spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Automotive design favors sharp, engineered edges over soft bubbles.

header.style: Sticky, solid white background with a crisp bottom border (border-gray-200). Utility bar at the very top (bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs py-2). Nav links are uppercase, font-bold, with a red underline animation on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E30613] text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider font-bold hover:bg-[#CC0000] transition-colors px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider font-bold hover:bg-black transition-colors px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border-2 border-gray-900 text-gray-900 rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider font-bold hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all px-6 py-3

cards.product: Cardless design. A crisp border around a white/gray background (bg-[#F5F5F7]). Image takes 70% height, specs and CTA take 30%. On hover, subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
cards.dashboard_widget: Solid white background, 1px border-gray-200, sharp corners. Clear, large typography for KPIs.

forms.style: Use Shadcn inputs but override to sharp corners (rounded-none). Focus state must be a sharp red ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E30613] focus:ring-offset-2). Labels are uppercase, text-xs, font-bold, text-gray-500.
forms.usage: Use Shadcn Select for dropdowns, Calendar for dates.

motion.hover: Fast, mechanical transitions (duration-150 ease-out). No slow, floaty animations.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids using Framer Motion.
motion.hero: Parallax effect on scroll for the hero background image.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (already installed) or @phosphor-icons/react (install if needed) for crisp, technical icons.

public_site.top_utility_bar: Contact info, Test Ride, On-Road Price
public_site.navigation: Home, Motorcycles, Scooters, Big Wing, Services, Finance, Contact
public_site.hero: Dynamic rotating slider featuring promotions and new launches
public_site.quick_actions: Bento-style grid below hero for high-intent actions (Buy Online, Insurance, Service Booking)
public_site.vehicle_showcase: Categorized tabs (Motorcycle, Scooter, EV) leading into grid of product cards
public_site.services_section: Dark section (#111) showcasing after-sales services and AMC with 'service_mechanic' image
public_site.tools: EMI Calculator embedded cleanly using range sliders and clear data visualization

admin_dashboard.layout: Left sidebar (fixed), top header with breadcrumbs and user profile, main content area
admin_dashboard.features: Data tables for Enquiries (Test Ride, Price Quotes, Service). Filterable by date and status.
admin_dashboard.stats: Top row KPI widgets (Total Enquiries Today, Pending Services, Active Insurance Renewals)

testing_rules.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, modal triggers) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case based on role (e.g., 'test-ride-submit-button', 'nav-motorcycles-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use generic tailwind blue or indigo. The primary brand color is Honda Red (#E30613).
Use standard HTML tags for layout structures, use Shadcn purely for complex interactive logic like Select, Forms, Dialogs, Tabs.
Implement the 'Quick Actions' section as a highly visual, icon-driven grid directly below the hero.
For the EMI Calculator, use a clean slider interface and real-time calculation display.
Ensure all forms (Enquiry, Service, Insurance) are fully styled with sharp edges and clear error/success states.
For the vehicle images in the grid, if specific assets are missing, use the 'products_placeholder' image or stylized CSS shapes with the vehicle name to maintain the layout integrity.
Build a functional Admin Dashboard layout with a sidebar and Shadcn Table for managing enquiries.
